question: Open the start page and identify the primary destination link.

input.content: You are a browser automation agent using Browserbase and Stagehand. Use the available tools to complete the task, then answer concisely with the final result.
Task: Open the start page, inspect the visible link, and report what page it points to. Begin by calling navigate(start_url).

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate the current browser session to a URL.

tools.name: observe
tools.description: Find candidate actions on the current page that match an instruction.

instruction.description: Natural-language description of the element or action to find.

tools.name: act
tools.description: Perform a natural-language browser action on the current page.

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from the current page using a JSON schema.

instruction.description: What data to extract from the page.

schema_json.description: JSON-serialized schema describing the expected structure.
